about.title: About Me
about.description: Creative professional with a passion for building exceptional experiences. My approach blends creative strategy with technical expertise, transforming concepts into purposeful results.

items.quote: Working with this professional brought our project to life. Their attention to detail is exceptional. They don't just deliver work; they build experiences that perfectly match the vision.
The quality provided is industry-standard. They have a unique ability to capture the exact emotion needed for a scene, whether it's an action-packed sequence or a subtle ambient background.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know about working with me on audio and music productions.

questions.label: What services do you offer?
questions.content: I specialize in sound design, Foley art, and music composition for games, audiovisual projects, and branding. I provide end-to-end audio production, including recording, mixing, and mastering.

questions.label: How do you approach a new project?
questions.content: My process starts with a deep dive into the creative vision. I work closely with developers and directors to understand the aesthetic goals, then iterate on sonic concepts through prototypes and technical implementation in tools like Reaper and Pro Tools.

questions.label: What formats do you deliver in?
questions.content: I deliver high-quality WAV, AIFF, or specialized formats for middleware implementation. I'm also proficient in delivering integrated audio assets ready for game engines.

questions.label: What gear and software do you use?
questions.content: I primarily work with Reaper and Pro Tools for DAW work, and DaVinci Resolve for video sync. My studio is equipped with professional-grade microphones and monitoring systems to ensure the highest fidelity.
